communication.name: translator
communication.description: Performs a Google translation. Example: {'name': 'translator', 'parameters': {'q': 'translate from english to german: good morning'}}

q.description: Defines the translation query. Should follow the format 'translate from [source language] to [target language]: [text to translate]'.

communication.name: emailer
communication.description: Send an email to specified recipients with a given subject and message.

to.description: List of email addresses to send the email to.

message.description: The content of the email message.

data_processing.name: URL_summarizer
data_processing.description: Creates a summary of the content at the provided URLs. The summary will be concise, highlight the key points, and accept a maximum token size for the summary. URLs must point to text-based content (e.g., TXT, CSV, HTML, JSON, XML, etc.) or PDF files.

context.description: Optional. Additional context to guide the summarization.

maxTokens.description: The maximum token size for the summary. Should be at least 1000 usually for usefulness.

sensory_perception.name: image_analyzer
sensory_perception.description: Performs a Google Lens call based on an image URL or file handle. Can do image recognition and transcribe it or extract text. Example: {'name': 'doImageAnalysis', 'parameters': {'url': 'https://example.com/image.jpg'}}

url.description: Defines the URL or file handle of an image to perform the Google Lens call.
